# MDSN

MDSN (Markdown Shared Notation) is a protocol and framework for building shared human-agent interactive pages from Markdown.

Official site: https://mdsn.ai
GitHub: https://github.com/mdsn-ai
X: https://x.com/mdsndev

## Primary entry points

- https://mdsn.ai/
- https://mdsn.ai/framework
- https://mdsn.ai/quick-start
- https://mdsn.ai/docs
- https://mdsn.ai/zh/docs
- https://mdsn.ai/examples
- https://mdsn.ai/blog
- https://mdsn.ai/skills-app
- https://mdsn.ai/roadmap

## Framework references

- https://mdsn.ai/zh/docs/site-development
- https://mdsn.ai/zh/docs/cli-reference
- https://mdsn.ai/zh/docs/config-reference
- https://mdsn.ai/zh/docs/action-reference
- https://mdsn.ai/zh/docs/sdk-reference

## Representation negotiation

- HTML: request with `Accept: text/html`
- Markdown source: request with `Accept: text/markdown` or use `.md` path (for example `/docs.md`)
- Page representations: request with `Accept: text/markdown` or `Accept: text/html`

For content-negotiated resources, servers should return `Vary: Accept`.
